title: daphnopsis cuneata subsp. uniflora
intro: Daphnopsis cuneata subsp. uniflora is a plant species, also known as the single-flowered daphnopsis, that belongs to the family Oleaceae and is native to the tropical regions of Central America and Mexico. The plant is rich in flavonoids and alkaloids, which possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Daphnopsis cuneata subsp. uniflora include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of this plant may involve infusions or decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
